instructions_to_main_agent: This project is 'JPM-SwingEdge Pro', a dense, institutional-grade quantitative trading dashboard for NSE markets.
Strictly use the provided hex codes for colors. No generic Tailwind default colors like 'blue-500' unless they perfectly match.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid: dense, gap-4 spacing, flat panels (bg-[#111827]) with 1px border (#1F2937), no shadows.
For typography, use IBM Plex Sans for UI and IBM Plex Mono for all financial numbers and tickers. Ensure numbers are tabular-nums.
Use TradingView Lightweight Charts for the main Stock Deep Dive and recharts for minor panels (FII/DII flow, risk comparison).
Ensure real-time WebSocket updates simulate a subtle background flash on data change.
All interactive and informational elements MUST include `data-testid`.

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Dense bento-style 'Control Room' grid. Elements use h-full to stretch and align mathematically.

buttons.primary: bg-[#3B82F6] text-white hover:bg-[#3B82F6]/90 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1F2937] text-[#F9FAFB] hover:bg-[#374151] px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-sm transition-colors
buttons.outline: border border-[#1F2937] text-[#9CA3AF] hover:text-[#F9FAFB] hover:bg-[#1F2937]/50 px-3 py-1.5 text-sm font-medium rounded-sm transition-colors

table.header: text-[10px] font-mono uppercase text-[#6B7280] text-left pb-2 border-b border-[#1F2937]

badges.bull: bg-[#10B981]/10 text-[#10B981] border border-[#10B981]/20 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[10px] font-mono uppercase
badges.bear: bg-[#EF4444]/10 text-[#EF4444] border border-[#EF4444]/20 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[10px] font-mono uppercase
badges.warning: bg-[#F59E0B]/10 text-[#F59E0B] border border-[#F59E0B]/20 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[10px] font-mono uppercase
badges.neutral: bg-[#1F2937] text-[#9CA3AF] border border-[#374151] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[10px] font-mono uppercase

inputs.base: bg-[#0A0E1A] border border-[#1F2937] rounded-sm px-2 py-1.5 text-sm text-[#F9FAFB] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#3B82F6] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#3B82F6]
inputs.slider: w-full h-1 bg-[#1F2937] rounded-sm appearance-none accent-[#3B82F6]

media_and_assets.charts: TradingView Lightweight Charts for primary stock charts; Recharts for static analytical charts.
